title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Saksoft Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
